text_raw: You're here.
text_clean: You're here.

text_raw: Strike the shepherd, and the flock will scatter.
text_clean: Strike the shepherd, and the flock will scatter.

text_raw: Everything will be alright.
text_clean: Everything will be alright.

text_raw: I'm sorry... I let my guard down.
text_clean: I'm sorry... I let my guard down.

text_raw: But jumping straight into a fight with them? We're all exhausted.
text_clean: But jumping straight into a fight with them? We're all exhausted.

text_raw: Fucking idiot. How'd you manage to botch this?
text_clean: Fucking idiot. How'd you manage to botch this?

text_raw: We had the bastard right in front of us and you let him slip away!
text_clean: We had the bastard right in front of us and you let him slip away!

text_raw: Let's hunt him down. He couldn't have got far.
text_clean: Let's hunt him down. He couldn't have got far.

text_raw: Except it fucking shouldn't.
text_clean: Except it fucking shouldn't.

text_raw: We went easy taking his hand. Next time it'll be his head.
text_clean: We went easy taking his hand. Next time it'll be his head.

text_raw: Fuck, we almost had that bastard...
text_clean: Fuck, we almost had that bastard...

text_raw: So {StaticInfo:Knowledge:Knowledge_Ludvig#Ludvig}'s still skulking around, and we're just letting him go?
text_clean: So {StaticInfo:Knowledge:Knowledge_Ludvig#Ludvig}'s still skulking around, and we're just letting him go?

text_raw: Exhausted or not, drink and a doze will fix that.
text_clean: Exhausted or not, drink and a doze will fix that.

text_raw: Fuck, fine... Alright, let's go gut some Bears first.
text_clean: Fuck, fine... Alright, let's go gut some Bears first.

text_raw: You know I'll be right there beside you. Been itching for this slaughter for a long time.
text_clean: You know I'll be right there beside you. Been itching for this slaughter for a long time.

text_raw: A shame he got away, but don't be too hard on Duane.
text_clean: A shame he got away, but don't be too hard on Duane.

text_raw: Anyway, he's not much of a threat on his own.
text_clean: Anyway, he's not much of a threat on his own.

text_raw: We'll kill him, no doubt.
text_clean: We'll kill him, no doubt.

text_raw: But the Black Bears still stand strong.
text_clean: But the Black Bears still stand strong.

text_raw: And there are far more of them than Jackals.
text_clean: And there are far more of them than Jackals.

text_raw: Right, we take out Myurdin, and the rest will flee on their own.
text_clean: Right, we take out Myurdin, and the rest will flee on their own.

text_raw: Exactly.
text_clean: Exactly.

text_raw: Feels as though the moment of this land's liberation draws near.
text_clean: Feels as though the moment of this land's liberation draws near.

text_raw: I presume you have a plan?
text_clean: I presume you have a plan?

text_raw: Fuck...
text_clean: Fuck...

text_raw: It happens.
text_clean: It happens.

text_raw: This fight won't end until we bring down Myurdin.
text_clean: This fight won't end until we bring down Myurdin.

text_raw: Of course not, we have to catch him no matter what.
text_clean: Of course not, we have to catch him no matter what.

text_raw: But Myurdin must already have grasped the situation here in Pailune.
text_clean: But Myurdin must already have grasped the situation here in Pailune.

text_raw: Dealing with Myurdin while chasing Ludvig won't be easy.
text_clean: Dealing with Myurdin while chasing Ludvig won't be easy.

text_raw: Taking down the Black Bears comes first.
text_clean: Taking down the Black Bears comes first.

text_raw: Look, Yann, I understand, but now is the perfect time to take down Myurdin.
text_clean: Look, Yann, I understand, but now is the perfect time to take down Myurdin.

text_raw: When everyone's ready, gather at the entrance to their stronghold.
text_clean: When everyone's ready, gather at the entrance to their stronghold.

text_raw: There's nothing much to it.
text_clean: There's nothing much to it.

text_raw: I've pictured this battle in my mind countless times.
text_clean: I've pictured this battle in my mind countless times.

text_raw: Aye.
text_clean: Aye.

text_raw: The storm's fury will tear you to shreds!
text_clean: The storm's fury will tear you to shreds!

text_raw: You dare covet the might of the sky? Foolish.
text_clean: You dare covet the might of the sky? Foolish.

text_raw: Will you endure the storm?
text_clean: Will you endure the storm?

text_raw: Resilient!
text_clean: Resilient!

text_raw: This blow can bring down mountains!
text_clean: This blow can bring down mountains!

text_raw: Small mortal... none have withstood me this long.
text_clean: Small mortal... none have withstood me this long.

text_raw: Struggle harder!
text_clean: Struggle harder!

text_raw: Show me your strength!
text_clean: Show me your strength!

text_raw: I'll show you the power of a god!
text_clean: I'll show you the power of a god!

text_raw: To fight so hard against a mortal...
text_clean: To fight so hard against a mortal...

text_raw: Well done, small one.
text_clean: Well done, small one.

text_raw: Our game ends here.
text_clean: Our game ends here.

text_raw: None survive the strike of my lightning...
text_clean: None survive the strike of my lightning...

text_raw: Your end is at hand.
text_clean: Your end is at hand.

text_raw: Now, take the full force!
text_clean: Now, take the full force!

text_raw: Indeed, fleeing is the wiser choice.
text_clean: Indeed, fleeing is the wiser choice.

text_raw: Mortal, have you come to covet my power?
text_clean: Mortal, have you come to covet my power?

text_raw: I simply revealed power to those who craved it.
text_clean: I simply revealed power to those who craved it.

text_raw: Show me your worth!
text_clean: Show me your worth!

text_raw: Show me you are fit to bear such power!
text_clean: Show me you are fit to bear such power!

text_raw: Your mortal pride dares to reach the power of the gods?
text_clean: Your mortal pride dares to reach the power of the gods?

text_raw: I shall deliver my judgment!
text_clean: I shall deliver my judgment!

text_raw: So, you fear death after all.
text_clean: So, you fear death after all.

text_raw: Pathetic mortal!
text_clean: Pathetic mortal!

text_raw: Impossible...
text_clean: Impossible...

text_raw: How do you endure my might?
text_clean: How do you endure my might?

text_raw: So be it... behold my true strength.
text_clean: So be it... behold my true strength.

text_raw: Now we will see if you have what it takes!
text_clean: Now we will see if you have what it takes!

text_raw: Look how you cower in the face of death, worm!
text_clean: Look how you cower in the face of death, worm!

text_raw: Now... I see the truth.
text_clean: Now... I see the truth.

text_raw: The very blood that flows within you...
text_clean: The very blood that flows within you...

text_raw: It is clear to me.
text_clean: It is clear to me.

text_raw: Urgh...
text_clean: Urgh...

text_raw: Stop this. Innocent people are dying.
text_clean: Stop this. Innocent people are dying.
